description: The primary criminal code of India. Defines offences and prescribes punishments.
Procedural law for administration of criminal justice including arrest bail trial and appeal.
Governs admissibility of evidence in courts of law.
Procedural law for civil suits including filing service of summons execution and appeal.
Governs formation performance discharge and breach of contracts.
Governs transfer of property by act of parties including sale mortgage lease and gift.
Mandates registration of documents relating to immovable property above specified value.
Governs Hindu marriages including conditions validity divorce and maintenance.
Governs succession and inheritance among Hindus. Provides equal rights to daughters.
Governs appointment of guardians for minors and welfare of children.
Governs adoption and maintenance among Hindus.
Governs personal law for Muslims including marriage divorce inheritance.
Enables civil marriage between persons of different religions castes or nationalities.

act_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act
description: Provides protection to women from domestic violence including physical sexual emotional and economic abuse.
Prohibits giving and taking of dowry at or before or after marriage.

act_name: Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act
description: Provides maintenance for parents and senior citizens from their children or relatives.
Provides for protection of interests of consumers and establishes consumer dispute redressal authorities.
Governs settlement of industrial disputes including strikes lockouts layoffs and retrenchment.
Ensures timely payment of wages to employees and prevents unauthorized deductions.
Fixes minimum rates of wages for employees in scheduled employments.

act_name: Employees Provident Funds and Misc Provisions Act
description: Provides for provident fund pension and deposit-linked insurance for employees.
Provides sickness maternity disablement and dependants benefit for employees.
Provides for payment of gratuity to employees who have completed 5 years of service.

act_name: Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act
description: Provides safe workplace for women and establishes internal and local complaints committees.
Regulates working conditions in factories including health safety welfare and working hours.
Regulates employment of contract labour in certain establishments.
Governs electronic commerce and digital signatures and prescribes penalties for cyber crimes.
Provides for protection of children from sexual offences and provides for special courts.
Governs promissory notes bills of exchange cheques and their dishonour.
Regulates motor vehicles registration driving licenses insurance and traffic offences.
Provides citizens the right to request information from public authorities.
Provides for more effective prevention of bribery and corruption in public offices.
Prevents money laundering and provides for confiscation of property derived from money laundering.
Prevents manufacture sale possession transport of narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances.
Regulates acquisition possession and carrying of arms and ammunition.
Provides for protection and improvement of environment and prevention of hazards.
Governs acquisition of land for public purposes and rehabilitation of affected persons.
Regulates real estate sector protects home buyers and promotes transparency.
Provides for insolvency resolution of companies and individuals.
Prohibits anti-competitive agreements and abuse of dominant position.
Governs domestic and international arbitration and conciliation proceedings.
Provides specific performance of contracts and injunctions as civil remedies.
Prescribes time limits for filing suits appeals and applications.
Governs succession for Christians Parsis and intestate succession for others.
Prohibits benami transactions in property and provides for confiscation.
Governs incorporation management regulation and winding up of companies.
Governs goods and services tax including offences and penalties for tax evasion.
Governs income tax assessment appeals and penalties for evasion.
Governs levy and collection of customs duty and prevents smuggling.
Regulates foreign exchange transactions in India.
Governs generation transmission distribution and trading of electricity.
Establishes TRAI for regulation of telecommunications services.
Ensures food safety and standards for sale of food.
Regulates import manufacture sale of drugs and cosmetics.
Regulates termination of pregnancies by registered medical practitioners.
Regulates removal storage and transplantation of human organs.
Provides mental healthcare services and protects rights of persons with mental illness.

act_name: Disability Act (Rights of Persons with Disabilities)
description: Provides for rights and entitlements of persons with disabilities.
Provides for care protection and rehabilitation of children in conflict with law.
Regulates certification of films for public exhibition.
Governs copyright protection in literary artistic musical and cinematograph works.
Governs grant maintenance and enforcement of patents.
Governs registration protection and enforcement of trademarks.
Provides for effective management of disasters and prohibits hoarding during disasters.
Governs conduct of elections to Parliament and State Legislatures.
Establishes Lokpal at Centre and Lokayuktas in states for enquiry into corruption.
Defines civil and criminal contempt of courts and prescribes punishment.
Governs enrollment practice and discipline of advocates.
Provides for protection of human rights established by NHRC.
Provides free legal services to weaker sections and organizes Lok Adalats.
Prohibits practice of untouchability and prescribes punishments.
Abolishes bonded labour system and provides for rehabilitation of bonded labourers.
Prohibits employment of children below 14 years in hazardous processes.
Provides maternity benefit to women employees during maternity period.
Provides compensation to workers for injuries sustained during employment.
Provides for control of production supply and distribution of essential commodities.
Prevents adulteration of food articles.
Governs manufacture possession use and navigation of aircraft.
Provides for protection of wild animals and birds.
Restricts de-reservation of forests for non-forest purposes.
Provides protection to plant breeders and farmers rights.
Provides for regulation of quality of seeds.
